item.title: Anthropic's "Profitability" Swindle 摘要
item.description:
Anthropic is projected to achieve its first operating profit of $559 million in Q2 2026, with revenue doubling to $10.9 billion. However, analysis reveals this profitability is largely artificial, driven by a discounted compute deal with SpaceX that reduces costs during May and June. The company's costs otherwise scale linearly with revenue. Additionally, Anthropic's reported revenue figures are inconsistent with previous ARR claims and CFO statements under oath, suggesting potential accounting maneuvers such as prepaid tokens or front-loaded commitments. The profit appears to be a temporary accounting artifact rather than sustainable business improvement.
标签: Anthropic, AI, profitability, accounting, SpaceX, revenue, costs, EBITDA, fundraising, tech industry

item.title: Couth and uncouth function pairs 摘要
item.description:
The article introduces the terms 'couth' and 'uncouth' for pairs of circular and hyperbolic functions (e.g., sin/sinh, cos/cosh) based on whether the identity i·arcfoo(w) = arcfooh(cw) holds. Using Python's NumPy, sin/sinh and tan/tanh are couth, while cos/cosh is uncouth. The reciprocal functions (sec, csc, cot) and their hyperbolic counterparts also exhibit couth/uncouth behavior depending on definitions. The author notes that NumPy wisely omits these reciprocal functions due to definitional ambiguities, as different definitions can change couth status.
标签: mathematics, trigonometry, hyperbolic functions, inverse functions, couth, uncouth, NumPy, Python, complex analysis, function pairs

item.title: datasette-agent-sprites 0.1a0 摘要
item.description:
Datasette Agent Sprites 0.1a0 is a plugin for Datasette Agent that enables running commands in a Fly Sprites sandbox. It provides a secure, isolated environment for executing code or scripts within the Datasette ecosystem, leveraging Fly's sandboxing technology. This initial alpha release allows users to integrate sandboxed command execution into their Datasette workflows, enhancing security for untrusted operations.
标签: datasette, datasette-agent, sandboxing, fly, sprites, plugin, security, alpha-release

item.title: Book Notes: “Poor Charlie’s Almanack” 摘要
item.description:
The author reflects on Charles T. Munger's philosophy from 'Poor Charlie's Almanack', emphasizing practicality and simplicity in problem-solving. Munger attributes Berkshire's success to avoiding hard problems and focusing on easy, actionable solutions, like jumping a low fence instead of a high one. His approach involves eliminating what not to do, applying multidisciplinary thinking, and acting decisively when conditions are right. Munger rejects the idea of avoiding mistakes, advocating instead for making fewer mistakes and fixing them quickly. The author appreciates Munger's straightforward, ego-free perspective, contrasting it with typical social media content.
标签: book review, Charlie Munger, investing, problem solving, practicality, simplicity, decision making, philosophy, business, wisdom

item.title: Apple Sports Expands to More Than 90 New Countries on Cusp of World Cup 摘要
item.description:
Apple Sports, the free iPhone app for real-time scores and stats, has expanded to over 170 countries, adding 90+ new markets. Designed for speed and simplicity, it offers personalized scoreboards and Live Activities on Lock Screen and Apple Watch. The app helps fans prepare for the World Cup by allowing tournament grouping and team following. While the UI has some quirks, such as a zero-sum team stats visualization, the app is fast and reliable, with sports-related promotions that don't obscure content. It remains the go-to for score checking except for baseball. The app is iPhone-only, which some find charming.
标签: Apple, Sports, iPhone, App, World Cup, Live Activities, Scoreboard, UI, Expansion, iOS

item.title: Datasette Agent 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison announces the first release of Datasette Agent, an extensible AI assistant for Datasette that provides a conversational interface for querying data. It integrates with the LLM library and supports plugins for charts, image generation, and code execution. A live demo runs on Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, and the system can also work with local models like Gemma-4 via LM Studio. Future plans include rolling out to Datasette Cloud and building personal AI assistants.
标签: datasette, AI, LLM, SQLite, plugins, open-source, data-analysis, generative-ai, datasette-agent, observable-plot

item.title: Alleged Kimwolf Botmaster ‘Dort’ Arrested, Charged in U.S. and Canada 摘要
item.description:
Canadian authorities arrested 23-year-old Jacob Butler, known as 'Dort,' for operating the Kimwolf IoT botnet, which enslaved millions of devices for record-breaking DDoS attacks reaching nearly 30 Tbps. The botnet caused over $1 million in losses per victim and issued 25,000 attack commands. Butler faces charges in Canada and the U.S. for computer intrusion, mischief, and swatting attacks. He was identified by KrebsOnSecurity in February 2026. The U.S. Department of Justice and international partners seized Kimwolf's infrastructure in March 2026.
标签: botnet, DDoS, IoT, cybercrime, arrest, Jacob Butler, Kimwolf, security, law enforcement, extortion

item.title: Notes on respectfully getting a personal copy of a website's contents 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses the ethical and practical approach to creating a personal copy of a website's content. It emphasizes identifying real content URLs while avoiding redundant index pages, using sitemaps or manual discovery. Respectful fetching involves slow request rates (e.g., one per 30-60 seconds), honest User-Agent headers, and monitoring for errors or rate limits. The goal is a personal copy, not a full archive, and politeness is stressed to avoid being blocked or rude.
标签: web scraping, ethics, rate limiting, sitemap, HTTP, crawling, archiving, politeness, User-Agent, personal copy
